title: sticherus hirtus var. ornamentalis
intro: Sticherus hirtus var. ornamentalis, also known as the ornamental beard fern, is a type of plant belonging to the family Gleicheniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
